title: Sorting does not work in projections
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
I need to filter data for one field and to sort data by any of other fields.
I use the projections.
But sorting dose not working, because projection is not used.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
24.12.4.49
### How to reproduce
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.test (
list_id LowCardinality(String),
item String,
created_at DateTime
)
ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree()
PRIMARY KEY (list_id)
ORDER BY (list_id, created_at)
;
--test data load
insert into default.test
SELECT t.list_id,  g.*
FROM generateRandom(
'item String, created_at DateTime',
1, 100, 1
) g
cross join (select generateUUIDv7() list_id from numbers(2) ) t
LIMIT 100000000;
ALTER TABLE default.test MODIFY SETTING deduplicate_merge_projection_mode = 'rebuild';
ALTER TABLE default.test ADD PROJECTION prj_list_id_created_at ( SELECT * ORDER BY (list_id, created_at) );
ALTER TABLE default.test MATERIALIZE PROJECTION prj_list_id_created_at;
--waiting for the creation of projection:
select * from system.mutations where table = 'tag_list_items' AND NOT is_done;
--sorting by item field is working using primary key
select *
from default.tag_list_items where list_id = '019a369d-0a96-7fbd-853c-a4335fd2ee9f'
order by item
limit 100
offset 10000
--but sorting by created_at field dose not working, because projection is not used
select *
from default.tag_list_items where list_id = '019a369d-0a96-7fbd-853c-a4335fd2ee9f'
order by created_at
limit 100
offset 6000
SETTINGS optimize_use_projections = 1, preferred_optimize_projection_name = 'prj_list_id_created_at'--, force_optimize_projection_name='prj_list_id_created_at'
why is the projection not used?
### Expected behavior
projection "prj_list_id_created_at" is used for sorting by created_at field.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_

key_bug_features: Sorting by created_at field does not use projection
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.test_v2 (
    list_id LowCardinality(String),
    item String,
    created_at DateTime,
    price Float64,
    is_active UInt8
) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree() PRIMARY KEY (list_id) ORDER BY (list_id, created_at);

INSERT INTO default.test_v2 SELECT t.list_id, g.item, g.created_at, g.price, g.is_active FROM generateRandom('item String, created_at DateTime, price Float64, is_active UInt8', 1, 100, 1) g CROSS JOIN (SELECT generateUUIDv7() list_id FROM numbers(2)) t LIMIT 100000;
ALTER TABLE default.test_v2 ADD PROJECTION prj_list_id_created_at ( SELECT * ORDER BY (list_id, created_at) );
ALTER TABLE default.test_v2 MATERIALIZE PROJECTION prj_list_id_created_at;

SELECT * FROM default.test_v2 WHERE list_id = '019a369d-0a96-7fbd-853c-a4335fd2ee9f' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 100 OFFSET 6000 SETTINGS optimize_use_projections = 1, preferred_optimize_projection_name = 'prj_list_id_created_at';
